title: Digital Skills in Northern Ireland 2023/24
body: "This paper examines the level of digital skills of people aged 16 and over in Northern Ireland, as sourced from the Continuous Household Survey (CHS). Additional analysis of digital skills levels is also provided for sex, age, labour market status, deprivation quintile (least and most deprived), disability status, and qualification level. "

taxons.title: Digital inclusion and accessibility in society
